name: Atul Gupta
role: CTO, PUCAR and Innovator in Residence, Agami
body: Atul is PUCAR's Chief Technology Officer and an Innovator in Residence at Agami, leading the technology strategy behind DRISTI, the open, modular and interoperable platform powering the collective's court transformation work. A cloud architect by training, he has spent years designing digital public infrastructure and digital public goods for national scale. He is also a certified independent director and ESG expert.
